reviews.review_title: Great idea but needs more polish
reviews.review_description: Needs better haptic feedback to make it feel more realistic.  The game doesn’t have any or not noticeable.  The Rock climbing needs to be about speed.  Very annoying that I have to go slow or I tire myself out.  Remove that because it’s annoying and what’s the point if everyone had to go the same speed.  The canoo needs tweaking.  I have to bend over way too much.  It feels like you are standing on the boat.  The game needs more games.  I believe they only have 6 and they all are like mini games.
